vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the current visual evidence. The desk environment shows a severe decline in biological activity.

inventory_reconciliation.P1 (Yellow Pot): Systemic Loss. No visible plant matter; soil appears dormant/barren.
inventory_reconciliation.P2 (Black Pot): Systemic Loss. No visible plant matter.
inventory_reconciliation.P3 (Black Pot): Systemic Loss. The Pothos specimen and the white rabbit anchor are absent from the current frame.
inventory_reconciliation.P4 (Black Pot): Systemic Loss. The seedling/cutting previously observed has vanished.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dark and potentially desiccated or overly saturated, but lacks any organic growth.
biome_observations.debris: Residual white fragments (likely eggshell) remain in the black pot, but no plant life is present.
biome_observations.lighting: Insufficient illumination in the final frames to support photosynthesis or visual identification.

temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-2: Gradual loss of turgor pressure in the P4 specimen; leaf chlorosis observed.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Total disappearance of all specimens. The environment has transitioned from a botanical workspace to an empty, dark, and unmaintained state.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome has suffered a total collapse. All specimens are either dead, removed, or buried. There is zero evidence of viable plant life in the current state.
vision_report.anomalies: The sudden removal of the white rabbit anchor (P3) and the complete absence of all plant matter suggests a deliberate clearing of the desk rather than natural decay.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic loss of the botanical collection. Over the observed period, the plants exhibited signs of terminal decline, culminating in the complete removal of all specimens and the anchor object. The current state is devoid of life.
